name: python3-recommonmark
title: python3-recommonmark
summary: CommonMark utility for Docutils and Sphinx projects -- Python 3
description:
CommonMark utility for Docutils and Sphinx projects -- Python 3
The recommonmark Python module allows ones to write CommonMark inside of
Docutils and Sphinx projects.
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-recommonmark because CommonMark utility for Docutils and Sphinx projects -- Python 3.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-recommonmark as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-recommonmark with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-recommonmark --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
